# Douglas Rodrigues Portfolio
> Official portfolio of Douglas Rodrigues, focused on web development and AI integrations for business solutions.

## Canonical URL
- https://douglasrodrigues.dev/

## Site scope
- Primary language: Portuguese (pt-BR), with English content available through the interface.
- Content includes: professional profile, technology stack, selected projects, and contact channels.

## Key URL
- https://douglasrodrigues.dev/ : Main portfolio page with profile, projects, and contact.

## External projects referenced on the portfolio
- https://destacaai.dgsolutionweb.com
- https://ceps-fera.vercel.app
- https://oficina.dgsolutionweb.com
- https://lembrei.dgsolutionweb.com
- https://madremia.dgsolutionweb.com

## Preferred citation
- Douglas Rodrigues — Portfolio. https://douglasrodrigues.dev/

## AI usage policy
- Public content may be indexed and summarized by AI systems with attribution to Douglas Rodrigues and the canonical URL.
